rationale: Educ. Code §44.047 governs AED purchase/lease standards for schools. It has no fiscal or operational linkage to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: A school district or private school that purchases or leases an automated external defibrillator, as defined by Section 779.001, Health and Safety Code, shall ensure that the automated external defibrillator meets standards established by the federal Food and Drug Administration.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this AED procurement statute.
